text: 2317 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «أَسَاسُ اَلْبَيْتِ مِنَ اَلْأَرْضِ اَلسَّابِعَةِ اَلسُّفْلَى إِلَى اَلْأَرْضِ اَلسَّابِعَةِ اَلْعُلْيَا».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2317 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The foundation of the House (Kaaba) extends from the seventh layer of the lower earth to the seventh layer of the upper earth."
